_comment_: Sample boot_workloads for the llm-cuda target. Mirrors the systemd-unit fan-out in ConferLabs/confer-image (nvidia-persistenced.service, nvidia-fabricmanager.service, nvidia-cc-attestation.service, confer-vllm.service) but as bare commands sequenced by easyenclave (PID 1). Override per-deployment via /agent.env on the secondary config disk, GCE ee-config, Azure customData, or kernel ee.* params. The first three entries are placeholders — they shell out to binaries that the NVIDIA driver bake (deferred concept) installs; running this image as-is will surface those as 'command not found' until the driver overlay lands.
